The only minor anomaly is a `console.log` statement in the lexer performAction, likely debugging code, not malicious.\n- **Malware Score:** 0.\n- **Obfuscated Score:** 0.\n- **Risk Score:** 0.1 — very low.\n- **Conclusion:** Correctly identified; no security issues.\n\n**Report 4:**\n- **Assessment:** Same pattern—standard generated parser/lexer.
